patch.value: Observed at 2026-05-24 00:23 Europe/Vienna while UTC was still 2026-05-23 22:23. The workflow line release_date="2026.05.23" caused the corrective production-readiness release to publish as v2026.05.23-7 instead of v2026.05.24.
Release workflow used UTC date for local 2026-05-24 release

The Daily Release workflow computed v2026.05.23-7 because it used date -u while the project operator timezone was already Europe/Vienna 2026-05-24. Release tags should use the configured release timezone so manual dispatch near local midnight does not publish under the previous local date.

- Release workflow computes date tags using Europe/Vienna timezone.
- Release documentation states the release timezone.
- Changelog records the timezone fix under v2026.05.24.
- Corrective release is published as v2026.05.24 and npm latest is 2026.5.24.
- Clean npm pm install verifies the corrected published package.
GitHub Actions Daily Release workflow_dispatch at local midnight
Trigger release.yml after Europe/Vienna midnight but before UTC midnight; old workflow uses date -u and produces the previous local date.
At Europe/Vienna 2026-05-24, the workflow creates v2026.05.24 and npm version 2026.5.24.
At Europe/Vienna 2026-05-24, the workflow created v2026.05.23-7 and npm version 2026.5.23-7 because UTC was still 2026-05-23.

value.author: codex
value.text: User reported the date mismatch immediately after v2026.05.23-7 publication.

value.author: codex
value.text: Use an explicit RELEASE_TIMEZONE environment variable rather than relying on runner default timezone.

value.author: codex
value.text: Date-based release workflows must define the business timezone or near-midnight dispatches can publish under the wrong date.

value.author: codex
value.text: The incorrect v2026.05.23-7 release remains published as historical evidence,but the corrective release will be v2026.05.24.

patch.value: The workflow now sets RELEASE_TIMEZONE to Europe/Vienna and uses TZ= date +%Y.%m.%d instead of date -u. docs/release.md documents the release timezone. Local verification confirmed TZ=Europe/Vienna date returns 2026.05.24, and npm run release:check passed with 18 tests, zero production vulnerabilities, package dry-run, and changelog check.
Changed the Daily Release workflow to compute date-based release tags with RELEASE_TIMEZONE=Europe/Vienna and documented the release timezone.
Release workflow timezone fixed and verified
